text: When removing a damaged shingle in the field area, it's always a good idea to cover the
surrounding shingles to prevent possible damage to the finish. Slide a siding zip tool under the
locks, work open, then slide out the damaged shingle. Remove the clips. Next, install a new
shingle, slide into the locks, and fasten with new clips. Reset the remaining shingles and close
the locks. Before installing the shingles, please refer to the detailed written instructions located
inside each shingle box. They can also be found online at metalworksroof.com, tamco.com, or by
